summary.intent: Implement Matrix OIDC authentication (Issue #711) to support homeservers using Matrix Authentication Service (MAS/MSC3861), which have deprecated password auth since April 2025.
summary.outcome: Full two-phase OIDC browser flow implemented across 19 modified files and 1 new file (crates/matrix/src/oidc.rs), with 785+ tests passing, clippy clean, and a PR created.

repo: ChannelRegistry stores plugins as Arc<RwLock<dyn ChannelPlugin>> — downcasting is impossible; new capabilities require adding default trait methods to ChannelPlugin
OAuth callback chain follows a three-level fallback: provider_setup → MCP → channel; channel OIDC was added as the third arm
Error conversion from channel errors to ServiceErrors uses .map_err(|e| e.to_string())? pattern consistently
Pre-existing clippy errors exist in moltis-providers; scoping clippy to modified crates (--package flags) avoids noise
Quality gates: cargo test, just lint (clippy), just format-check (rustfmt), biome check --write for JS
The AccountState struct uses Mutex-wrapped Option fields for transient state (e.g. oidc_pending) held between two-phase flows

code.finding: matrix_sdk::store::RoomLoadSettings is the correct import path — RoomLoadSettings is re-exported through matrix_sdk's store module, not matrix_sdk_base directly

Raw::new(val: &T) returns serde_json::Result<Self>; must be unwrapped. Localized::new requires explicit type annotation Vec::<(LanguageTag, _)>::new() when passing empty collections due to type inference limits
should_rebuild_store_after_auth_error already only triggers for Password mode — OIDC auth failures naturally propagate without needing explicit guards
oauth_start/oauth_complete iterate all plugins via registry to find the one with a matching pending CSRF state, since the gateway has no direct reference to MatrixPlugin

workflow: Checking compilation incrementally per crate (cargo check -p) is faster than workspace-wide checks during iterative fixes
Distinguishing pre-existing lint/compile errors from newly introduced ones by filtering error output by file path saves debugging time
matrix-sdk-base is available as a transitive dep and accessible via matrix_sdk::store re-exports without adding it explicitly to Cargo.toml

friction: Rate limit hits mid-implementation caused two interruptions requiring 'proceed' prompts to continue
matrix-sdk 0.16 OAuth API types (RoomLoadSettings, Raw, Localized, ClientRegistrationData) required multiple cargo check iterations to discover correct import paths and constructor signatures

ChannelRegistry's trait-object storage required adding oidc_start/oidc_complete as default methods to ChannelPlugin trait rather than directly calling MatrixPlugin methods — architectural constraint not obvious upfront
Localized::new type inference failure with empty Vec required explicit turbofish annotation
Collapsible-if clippy lint in gateway/src/channel.rs required a fixup pass after initial implementation
open_items: E2E Playwright tests (crates/web/ui/e2e/specs/channels-matrix.spec.js) were specified in the plan but never created — the file does not appear in git status
Manual QA (start Moltis, add Matrix with OIDC, verify browser opens auth page) was not performed during the session
The config field was removed from OidcPendingState as unused — if the complete phase ever needs original config (e.g. for oidc_issuer override), it will need to be re-added
Re-authenticate flow for EditMatrixModal was added to the UI but the backend path (triggering a new oidc_start for an existing channel) was not explicitly tested
